final:
module top_module(
  input [7:0] min_val,
  input [7:0] b,
  input [7:0] c,
  output reg [7:0] y
);always @(*) begin
    if(min_val >= b && min_val >= c) begin
      y = min_val;
    end else if(b >= min_val && b >= c) begin
      y = b;
    end else begin
      y = c;
    end
  end

endmodule
